dublinCore.dc:title: 101 HR 7269 IH: Helping Our People Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Randall (for herself and Ms. Strickland) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the Puyallup Tribe of Indians Settlement Act of 1989 to clarify that amounts in the Puyallup Tribe of Indians Settlement Trust Fund may be withdrawn by the Puyallup Tribe of Indians, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Helping Our People Act of 2026 or the kʷaxʷad tiiɫ ʔiišədčəɫ Act of 2026.

section.header: Withdrawal of trust fund by Puyallup Tribe of Indians

subsection.header: Permanent trust fund for Tribal members
subsection.text: Section 6(b) of the Puyallup Tribe of Indians Settlement Act of 1989 (Public Law 101–41; 103 Stat. 87) is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Amounts in the trust fund may be withdrawn by the Tribe pursuant to the American Indian Trust Fund Management Reform Act of 1994 (25 U.S.C. 4001 et seq.) under a management plan approved by the Secretary under that Act.

subsection.text: The Puyallup Tribe of Indians Settlement Act of 1989 (Public Law 101–41; 103 Stat. 83) is amended by adding at the end the following:

section.text: Nothing in this Act prevents the United States from engaging with the Tribe, on the same basis as other federally recognized Indian Tribes, under any Federal law enacted after the date of enactment of this Act.
